visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse store, specifically a toy aisle. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a black vest, stands in front of a massive display bin overflowing with large, colorful plush dolls. She is seen touching a purple Kuromi plush and a pink Hello Kitty plush, her facial expressions showing excitement and joy as she looks at the items. (2) The camera zooms in slightly as the woman picks up a large Hello Kitty plush, showcasing its soft pink fabric and yellow hat. The background remains consistent with high industrial ceilings, fluorescent lights, and shelves stocked with bicycles and outdoor gear. She handles the plushies with care, moving them around to see the different characters available in the bin. (3) A significant visual event occurs as she pushes aside the Sanrio dolls to reveal a Luigi plush from the Super Mario series, wrapped in clear plastic, buried at the bottom. The woman points at the green-capped character while smiling at the camera. Yellow and pink graphic text overlays appear on the screen to emphasize the discovery. (4) The camera focuses on a close-up of the purple Kuromi plush. The woman demonstrates the plush's features, specifically lifting a built-in purple sleep mask on the character's head to show its sleeping eyes underneath. Her hands are the primary focus as she feels the soft, textured fabric of the doll. (5) The camera tilts upwards, moving away from the woman and the toys to focus on a price sign hanging from the ceiling. The sign displays the number 789 in large black font. In the background, various electric bikes and scooters are visible on display, indicating the scale and variety of the warehouse environment.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 闖入陌生男子?. [Slogan]: 酷洛米&Kitty 趴睡大娃娃. (2) [Subtitle]: 為什麼你有那麼可愛的酷洛米. (3) [Subtitle]: 還有Kitty哇. (4) [Subtitle]: Kitty我覺得還好. (5) [Subtitle]: 重點是酷洛米耶. (6) [Subtitle]: 不是啊 這是. [Variety]: 你對Kitty的偏見. (7) [Subtitle]: 他做的好可愛. (8) [Subtitle]: Kitty很多周邊啊 這個還好. (9) [Subtitle]: 那麼夢幻的Kitty跟酷洛米. (10) [Subtitle]: 中間怎麼會有一路. (11) [Subtitle]: 瑪麗歐. (12) [Subtitle]: 請問瑪麗歐大叔啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 路易吉 路易吉. [Variety]: 你怎麼在我們的少女區. (14) [Subtitle]: 他可能也喜歡酷洛米. (15) [Subtitle]: 這好可愛哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 而且很大一個. (17) [Subtitle]: 摸起來如何. (18) [Subtitle]: 舒服 很舒服. (19) [Subtitle]: 還有做眼罩 趴趴坐的. (20) [Subtitle]: 他一定. (21) [Subtitle]: 會有特價的時候 大家可以等特價的時候再買. (22) [Subtitle]: 789元. (23) [Subtitle]: 我猜他應該就是直接折200了.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator interacting with the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with puffy sleeves and a black sleeveless vest/apron.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and rows of products including bicycles, scooters, and plush toys in large bins.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track begins with an energetic, high-tempo electronic BGM characterized by a bright synth melody and a steady 4/4 drum beat. A female voice speaks with high arousal and a friendly, excited tone, expressing admiration for the cuteness of a character. (2) A sharp transition occurs as a male voice enters the conversation. His tone is playful and slightly teasing as he mentions a 'prejudice.' The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume, providing a cheerful backdrop. Faint rustling sounds of soft fabric can be heard beneath the dialogue. (3) The female voice laughs and continues to narrate with a fast speech rate. A distinct 'pop' sound effect highlights a comedic moment when a new character is mentioned. The male voice asks a question with a rising intonation, creating a conversational dynamic. (4) The female voice describes physical sensations using descriptive adjectives, her pitch rising as she emphasizes the 'comfort' of the item. Short, percussive synth hits in the BGM punctuate her speech. The male voice concludes by discussing numerical figures and pricing with a confident, narrative tone before the audio fades out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to showcase a popular shopping find at Costco (Sanrio plushies) while utilizing a humorous 'Easter egg' discovery (the misplaced Luigi doll) to engage the audience. It serves as both lifestyle content and an informal product review, highlighting the aesthetic appeal, texture, and price of the merchandise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Organic shopping vlog style without explicit promotional calls to action for a specific brand partnership.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media editing tropes such as large colorful subtitles and fast jump cuts to maintain high viewer engagement. The discovery of the 'misplaced' Luigi toy is the central comedic hook.
